index.hero.title: All Restaurants,
index.hero.subtitle: Discover, explore, and reserve tables at the finest restaurants — all in seconds.
index.how.title: How It Works
index.how.description: Reserve your perfect table in three easy steps.
index.steps.search.title: Search
index.steps.search.description: Browse hundreds of restaurants by cuisine, location, price range, or occasion.
index.steps.book.title: Book
index.steps.book.description: Pick your date, time, and party size. Reserve instantly — no waiting, no calls.
index.steps.dine.title: Dine
index.steps.dine.description: Show up and enjoy. Your table will be ready and waiting just for you.
index.featured.title: Featured Restaurants
index.featured.description: From cozy bistros to fine dining — find your next favourite spot.
index.testimonials.title: Loved by Food Enthusiasts
index.testimonial1.quote: ReserveHub made our anniversary dinner absolutely seamless. Found a rooftop restaurant in 2 minutes and booked instantly. Incredible!
index.testimonial2.quote: I used to spend 20 mins calling restaurants. Now I book in seconds. ReserveHub is the app I never knew I needed until now.
index.testimonial3.quote: The filter by occasion feature is a game-changer. Found the perfect spot for my parents' birthday with just a few clicks!
index.cta.title: Ready to Reserve Your Next Table?
index.cta.description: Join over 50,000 happy diners who book with ReserveHub every month.

about.hero.subtitle: ReserveHub was born from a simple idea: exploring great food should be effortless. We bridge the gap between passionate foodies and exceptional restaurants, making every reservation a seamless experience.
about.card1.title: Curated Selection
about.card1.description: We handpick our restaurant partners, ensuring you always have access to the finest dining experiences in your city.
about.card2.title: Instant Booking
about.card2.description: Say goodbye to long wait times on the phone. With ReserveHub, your perfect table is just a few clicks away.
about.card3.title: Verified Reviews
about.card3.description: Real reviews from real diners. We believe in transparency so you can choose your next meal with confidence.
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.description: To elevate the dining ecosystem by providing an intuitive platform that empowers both diners to discover amazing food and restaurants to manage their spaces efficiently.
about.cta.title: Join the Food Revolution
about.cta.description: Start discovering and booking top restaurants today with ReserveHub.
